parameters.jsCode:
const prevRecord = $('Split Into Items').item.json;
return [{ json: { ...prevRecord, contact_email: null, contact_name: null, hunter_confidence: null } }];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ api_key: $env.APOLLO_API_KEY, q_organization_domains_list: [$json.domain], person_titles: ['owner', 'ceo', 'president'], "dnc_statuses": ["no"], page: 1, per_page: 5 }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ properties: { firstname: $json.contact_name ? $json.contact_name.split(' ')[0] : 'Owner', lastname: $json.contact_name ? $json.contact_name.split(' ').slice(1).join(' ') : '', email: $json.contact_email || '', phone: $json.phone || '', company: $json.business_name || '', website: $json.website || '', city: $json.city || '', state: $json.state || '', hs_lead_status: 'NEW', lead_source: 'Google Maps Scrape', ai_automation_score: String($json.ai_score || ''), automation_pain_signals: $json.ai_signals || '', lead_summary: $json.ai_summary || '', google_rating: String($json.google_rating || ''), review_count: String($json.review_count || '') } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ properties: { ai_automation_score: String($json.ai_score || ''), automation_pain_signals: $json.ai_signals || '', lead_summary: $json.ai_summary || '', phone: $json.phone || '', hs_lead_status: 'NEW' } }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ properties: { dealname: $json.business_name + ' — AI Automation', pipeline: 'default', dealstage: 'appointmentscheduled', lead_score: String($json.ai_score || '') } }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ inputs: [{ from: { id: $json.deal_id }, to: { id: $json.contact_id }, type: 'deal_to_contact' }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ fields: { status: 'Pushed', contact_email: $('Set Contact ID').item.json.contact_email || '', contact_name: $('Set Contact ID').item.json.contact_name || '', mobile_phone: $('Set Contact ID').item.json.mobile_phone || '', hubspot_contact_id: $('Set Contact ID').item.json.hubspot_contact_id || '', date_pushed: new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0] } }) }}
